intents.response: Namaste Kisan bhai! I am Kisan Mitra. I can help you with crop disease, weather, fertilizer, soil, irrigation and pest problems. How can I help you today?

Your crop may have a fungal or bacterial infection. 1) Remove infected leaves immediately. 2) Spray copper fungicide or neem oil solution. 3) Avoid overwatering. 4) If problem continues, contact your local Krishi Kendra.

patterns: is it good day for farming
DAP or urea which is better
intents.response: For most crops: 1) Use DAP at sowing time for phosphorus. 2) Apply Urea in 2 splits - at 20 days and 40 days after sowing. 3) For organic option use compost or vermicompost. Always do soil testing first at your Krishi Kendra for best results.

To improve soil health: 1) Add organic compost or cow dung manure. 2) For dry soil - mulching helps retain moisture. 3) For acidic soil - add lime powder. 4) Get your free Soil Health Card from PM Soil Health Card Scheme at your nearest Krishi Kendra.

patterns: how to save water in farming
intents.response: Smart irrigation tips: 1) Water in early morning or evening - not afternoon. 2) Drip irrigation saves 40% water vs flood irrigation. 3) Check soil moisture before watering - stick finger 2 inches deep, if dry then water. 4) PM Krishi Sinchai Yojana gives subsidy on drip systems.

For pest control: 1) First try neem oil spray - mix 5ml neem oil in 1 litre water. 2) Yellow sticky traps for whitefly and aphids. 3) For serious attack use approved pesticide from local Krishi Kendra. 4) Never spray pesticide if rain expected in 4 hours. 5) Use protective gear while spraying.

Gujarat crop calendar: 1) Kharif season (June-November) - Cotton, Groundnut, Rice, Bajra. 2) Rabi season (October-March) - Wheat, Cumin, Mustard, Chickpea. 3) Summer season (March-June) - Vegetables, Sesame. For best crop selection based on your soil and water, visit eKrishi Sanchar portal.

Important schemes for you: 1) PM-KISAN - Rs 6000/year direct to bank account. 2) PM Fasal Bima Yojana - crop insurance at low premium. 3) Kisan Credit Card - farming loan at 4% interest. 4) Soil Health Card - free soil testing. 5) PM Krishi Sinchai - drip irrigation subsidy. Visit pmkisan.gov.in or call 155261 for details.
Jai Jawan Jai Kisan! Feel free to come back anytime. Wishing you a great harvest this season, Kisan bhai!
